title: Penalty
doc_html:
§853. Penalty

            Whoever violates any provision of this Subpart shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.

            Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
doc_text:
§853.  Penalty
Whoever violates any provision of this Subpart shall be fined not more than five
hundred dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.
Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
